channel.title: Ping on TLDRBins
channel.description: Recent content in Ping on TLDRBins

item.title: Network Discovery
item.description: Test Connectivity ping -c3 10.10.11.10 Test Reverse Connectivity sudo tcpdump -ni tun0 icmp Use ping to Scan Subnet for i in $(seq 1 254); do (ping -c 1 10.100.10.${i} | grep "bytes from" &); done; Use nc to Scan Ports for i in $(seq 1 65535); do (nc -zvn 127.0.0.1 ${i} 2>&1 | grep -v "Connection refused" &); done Check ARP arp -na cat /proc/net/arp Check IP # Linux ifconfig ip addr cat /proc/net/fib_trie # Windows ipconfig Check Network Connections # TCP netstat -plant # UDP netstat -plunt # Windows netstat -ano
